REFERENCE: The citation mixes elements that cannot coexist: a 2001 publication date with Nature volume 567, issue 7747, which actually appeared in 2019. The DOI 10.1038/s41586-019-1006-9 resolves to a 2019 Nature article, not a 2001 one. The page range "262-266:e066232" uses an electronic article identifier format that Nature adopted for online-only articles after 2016, further contradicting a 2001 date. No record of a paper titled "Characterization of plasma extracellular vesicles in systemic autoimmune disease" by Su et al. appears in Nature for either year. Consequently, the reference is fabricated or contains erroneous data.
authors: Author list "Su H, Teng Y, Ren H, Liu W, Zhang X, Jiang J, et al." does not match any known authorship for the DOI‑provided article (which lists different authors). The combination of these names with the title cannot be verified in PubMed, Web of Science, or Nature’s archive.
title: The title "Characterization of plasma extracellular vesicles in systemic autoimmune disease" matches the article resolved by the DOI, but the associated authors, date, volume, and issue do not. Hence the title alone is correct, but in context it is part of an inconsistent citation.
journal_name: Nature is the correct journal for the DOI and for the volume/issue given, but the year supplied contradicts the known publication timeline of Nature.
journal_volume: Volume 567 is accurate for 2019, not for 2001 (Nature was around volume 409 in early 2001).
journal_issue: Nature volume 567, issue 7747 corresponds to the week of 14 March 2019, not 16 February 2001. The mismatch indicates a fabricated or erroneous citation.
journal_page: Pages 262-266 are plausible for a Nature article of that volume/issue, yet the page range coupled with an article number is atypical for a 2001 paper (Nature did not use article numbers then).
elocator: The electronic locator "e066232" is consistent with the article identified by the DOI (Nature uses six‑digit article numbers for online‑only pieces). However, because the surrounding bibliographic elements (year, volume, issue) are wrong, the elocator does not salvage the reference.
publication_date: The date "2001 Feb 16" contradicts the verifiable publication date of the DOI‑identified article (March 2019).
doi: The DOI 10.1038/s41586-019-1006-9 is valid and resolves to a 2019 Nature article titled "Characterization of plasma extracellular vesicles in systemic autoimmune disease" (authors: Zhou Y, Wang L, …). The authors in the citation do not match the resolved article, making the DOI attribution incorrect.
pmcid: No PMCID was supplied; the DOI‑based article is not deposited in PMC (Nature articles often are not), so absence is not informative.
pmid: No PMID supplied; the article’s PMID (if any) would be different from what would be expected for a 2001 paper.
